title: broken_code.jar
description: The code has broken, and you’re no longer alone.
body:
<big> **STILL IN DEVELOPMENT** </big>

**_He made it. Now he can’t get rid of it._**

**IF YOU FIND ANY BUGS, THEN CONTACT ME ON DISCORD. My username is "pifxl"**

A horror-driven Minecraft mod that blurs the line between game and glitch. What starts as corrupted textures and missing blocks soon spirals into full-fledged entities that stalk, hunt, and unsettle you in ways that feel wrong.

_You aren’t just surviving mobs anymore... you’re surviving the code itself._


```
HUGE INSPERATION FROM OTHER HORROR MODS LIKE The Broken Script, no_moon.jar, Awake & Conscious, and Split Self.
```


## ⚠️ Disclaimer:
**This project was developed with the assistance of AI tools, though all design, entity concepts, and integration into Minecraft were guided and refined by hand. The AI helped shape narrative consistency, flavor text, and write code, while the mod itself was built to function in-game.**

**Sadly, this mod doesn't work with Optifine. But on a good note, I've tested it with Embeddium and Oculus, and I got shaders working. So this mod only works with those 2 mods if you want shaders, from what I know.**

**Also, this mod is still being made, and since I'm one person and lazy, this mod might not get a lot of updates, so I'd recommend you play this mod with other horror mods like The Broken Script or no_moon.jar.**

**Another thing, I am unsure if this mod works with multiplayer or not, but I'd recommend you play on singleplayer**

**Also, to the creators of The Broken Script, one of the songs in that mod is in this mod, so if you don't allow people to use that without permission, please tell me.**

### Things to know before playing:
- This mod can access information about you from your PC,
- This mod can crash your game (intentionally),
- This mod can create text files on your desktop (you can remove them by deleting them),
- This mod can create pop-ups on your screen.

## LICENSE

**- You may use this in modpacks as long as credit is given.**

**- Do not redistribute outside CurseForge/Modrinth.**
